evals.prompt: Create an agent that can search the web for information
evals.expected_output: A valid JSON with inputNode, agent, and search tool
assertions: Agent has search tool in children

evals.prompt: Build a research team with a manager that coordinates a web researcher and a document analyzer
evals.expected_output: A valid JSON with manager agent and two subAgents with appropriate tools

evals.prompt: Create a content creation system with a manager, a researcher, a writer, and an image generator
evals.expected_output: A valid JSON with manager agent and three specialized subAgents

evals.prompt: Build a hierarchical agent system with a top-level manager, a middle-level supervisor, and a leaf-level worker
evals.expected_output: A valid JSON with nested subAgent structure

evals.prompt: Create a complete agent system with a manager that has a model (GPT), a search tool, and a subAgent with its own tools
evals.expected_output: A valid JSON with agent having model, tool, and subAgent
